mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals accelerating household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower 3-month RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals weakening labor income and recession risk, reducing expected corporate earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment increases are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if triggered mean returns are not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate remains near the zero lower bound while consumer inflation is falling, discount-rate pressure stays low and real purchasing power improves, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.25 and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate below its 12-month inflation rate
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL trigger does not raise average 20-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional average, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals weaker manufacturing output and lower operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are statistically indistinguishable from non-triggered returns at p > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in housing starts signals improving construction activity, household formation, and durable-goods demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST growth triggers fail to produce above-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward evaluation or if the hit rate after triggers is below the unconditional positive-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with accelerating consumer prices signals rising wage and inflation pressure that increases expected monetary tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month job growth above 600000 and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate above its 12-month inflation rate
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS and CPIAUCSL joint trigger is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if its interaction term has a non-negative estimated return effect.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate from a low-rate regime raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 3-month change crosses above 0.10 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS upward-crossing triggers do not lower average 5-day S&P 500 returns relative to non-triggered days or if the sign of the estimated effect is positive in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth above its trailing annual pace signals broad demand expansion and improving aggregate earnings capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarter annualized growth crosses above its trailing 4-quarter growth rate
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 acceleration triggers fail to produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations, or if walk-forward Rank IC between GDPC1 growth acceleration and returns is below 0.03.
